name: Med Link Transportation Inc
recent_news: No web presence or news found; flagged in source data as special-needs (not school) transport. Phone (623) 877-7433 suggests Phoenix West Valley / Glendale area but no website or directory listing confirmed.
fit_notes: Sub-scale NEMT operator (~12 employees, ~$0.9M rev) with no confirmed school-bus or SPED contracts. Not a Summit tuck-in target absent confirmation of yellow-bus / district contracts.

name: Superior Ride LLC
recent_news: No confirmed web presence under this exact name. Multiple unrelated AZ entities (Superior Transportation Service LLC in Scottsdale; Transportes Superior in Phoenix) exist but none match the 623-398-7280 phone number, which is West Valley Phoenix area.
fit_notes: Single-vehicle / micro NEMT operator. ~12 employees and ~$0.9M revenue place it well below Summit's tuck-in threshold; no school-bus indicators.

name: Excel Transport LLC
recent_news: No website, phone, or news located for the San Antonio entity at 1635 Columbia Sq. Multiple unrelated 'Excel Transport' carriers exist nationally (auto transport in SC; Excel Driver Services is a CDL school in SA, not an operator). No school-bus or SPED contract evidence.
fit_notes: Micro operator (~11 employees, ~$0.9M rev) with no confirmed school transportation footprint. Not a viable Summit tuck-in without further verification of contracts and fleet.

name: Nostalgia Limo
recent_news: Limousine/vintage car service in Gwynn Oak, MD; no school bus or SPED district contracts identified. No M&A, ownership, or growth news found.
fit_notes: Limo/livery business, not a school-bus contractor despite source-data 'special_needs' flag. Not a Summit tuck-in target — wrong service line.

name: Woodland Wheelchair Svc Inc
recent_news: Founded 1992, incorporated 1994; long-tenured owner-operator Carolyn Trice. BBB file open since 2007 but not accredited. Some mixed customer reviews. No M&A activity reported.
fit_notes: 34+ year-old owner-operated wheelchair/NEMT business in SW Washington — owner likely near retirement (succession signal high), but scale is tiny (~7 employees, ~$235K-$850K revenue) and there is no evidence of yellow-bus or school district SPED contracts. Below Summit tuck-in threshold; pass unless district SPED contracts can be confirmed.
